---
title: "Tools"
description: "Browser-based tools that run entirely client-side. No data leaves your browser."
sidebar: false
toc: false
format:
  html:
    anchor-sections: false
---

A collection of free, browser-based utilities. Everything runs locally in your browser — no data is uploaded anywhere.

---

### [Image to JPEG Optimizer](image-to-jpeg.html)
Drag-and-drop image converter and optimizer. Compress any image to JPEG with adjustable quality, compare original vs optimized side-by-side, and download the result.

---

::: {.template-credit}
*Inspired by [tools.simonwillison.net](https://tools.simonwillison.net/).*
:::
